name: ZooDrop
author: Poki
description: Zoodrop is a cute merging Suika game where you can enjoy the bouncy fun physics! Dive into the simple yet engaging gameplay—merge animals to create larger and more impressive creatures until you reach the legendary Double Whale for the ultimate high score! The thrill lies in claiming the top spot on the daily leaderboards. Can you beat others and secure your No.1 position? How to play ZooDrop? To move the animals, left-click and hold your mouse, then release it to drop them. Alternatively, you can use the left and right arrow keys to move the animals, and the space bar to drop them! Who created ZooDrop? ZooDrop is created by Stephen Haney. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play ZooDrop for free? You can play ZooDrop for free on Poki. Can I play ZooDrop on mobile devices and desktop? ZooDrop can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
